ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., 11U Gamers) */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Color of the team (e.g., Black, Cardinal) */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the team is participating in */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "coach_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's website */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Current number of players on the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles or links for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the performance record belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the team */,
  "run_differential" INTEGER /* Run differential (difference between runs scored and runs allowed) */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the performance is recorded for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Average batting performance of the team */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Average number of earned runs allowed per nine innings */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total number of strikeouts by the team */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total number of walks given by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average of the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "number_of_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player has played */,
  "number_of_hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "number_of_home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the player */,
  "number_of_walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  "number_of_strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game is part of */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the performance record belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the performance is recorded for */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the game */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player in the game */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player in the game */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player in the game */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player in the game */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs allowed by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
